2605.27320.title: Modeling Agentic Technical Debt and Stochastic Tax: A Standalone Framework for Measurement, Simulation, and Dashboarding
2605.27320.paper_summary: Agentic AI systems combine probabilistic reasoning with delegated action through tools, context, memory, orchestration, and external workflow integration. This note develops a formal and managerially usable model that distinguishes Agentic Technical Debt from Stochastic Tax. Agentic Technical Debt is a stock of accumulated design and governance liability. Stochastic Tax is a recurring flow of operating burden that arises when stochastic agents are used in business workflows. The two constructs are related, but they are not the same: debt can amplify the tax, while the tax can remain positive even when debt is minimized. The note starts from a compact dashboard expression, expands it into a fuller structural model, defines all variables and parameters, shows how each cost category can be estimated from operational data, and illustrates the framework with an accounts-payable simulation and companion spreadsheet.
2605.27320.paper_summary_zh: 代理 AI 系統結合了概率推理與通過工具、上下文、記憶、協調和外部工作流程整合的委派行動。這篇筆記發展出一個正式且可供管理使用的模型，區分代理技術債務與隨機稅。代理技術債務是累積的設計和治理負債的存量。隨機稅是當在商業工作流程中使用隨機代理時產生的經常性運營負擔流。這兩個概念是相關的，但並不相同：債務可以放大稅負，而即使在債務最小化的情況下，稅負仍然可以保持正值。這篇筆記從一個簡潔的儀表板表達開始，擴展為一個更完整的結構模型，定義所有變數和參數，展示如何從運營數據中估算每個成本類別，並通過應付賬款模擬和伴隨的電子表格來說明該框架。
2605.27320.author: Muhammad Zia Hydari et.al.
2605.27320.authors: Muhammad Zia Hydari, Raja Iqbal, Narayan Ramasubbu
